Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Raymond N. Stella Erlach
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAYMOND N.S. ERLACH, TEL. NO. 1-415-788-3322 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KIMBERLY A. SHIELD OF MURPHY PEARSON & FEENEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-788-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT ROBERT ABEL'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Raymond N. Stella Erlach - The motion to compel deposition is denied on the condition that Mr. Erlach would not be called as a witness by Plaintiff in this case. The defendant, however, may pose written deposition questions or interrogatories on Mr. Erlach by noon tomorrow and Response due by the end of business day on Juy 1, 2016. Compliance hearing is set for July 6, 2016 if there are any remaining issues to be resolved. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Raymond Erlach of Law Offices of Raymond N. Stella Erlach telephone number 415-788-3322 for Plaintiff Lisa Stranko.
Karen Stromeyer of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendant Robert Abel.

The Court reads the tentative ruling on the record (copies provided to Counsel). The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROBERT ABEL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is granted as to the breach of fiduciary duty cause of action and granted as to the claim for punitive damages for the reasons stated on the record. Plaintiff is not entitled to pain and suffering damages (reasons also stated on the record). Ms. Stromeyer is to prepare a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312. In addition, Judge Bolanos makes the following disclosure: Mr. Able was opposing Counsel on a case before she was on the bench and she has not had any contact with him since.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)

Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
